notes: (1) Header chip now shows the running version (e.g. v1.7.2) instead of the static 'OFFLINE' label. When a newer release is detected the chip flips to 'update vX.Y.Z' (green, clickable). (2) Tapping the update chip used to require two presses to actually take effect — the first reload was served by the still-old service worker. applyUpdate now waits for the new SW's controllerchange event (with a 2.5s fallback) before reloading, so a single tap reliably applies the update. SW cache bumped to v7.
